headline: Gapping S&P500 stocks in Tuesday's session

headline: Power Solutions: I May Sound Like A Broken Record But It's Still A Buy After Disastrous Earnings
summary: Power Solutions International (PSIX) saw a disastrous Q1, missing revenue by 20% and sharply disappointing on EPS, shifting the narrative to a turnaround...
